channel.title: Art on Dillon de Silva
channel.description: Recent content in Art on Dillon de Silva

item.title: Why I Decided to Combine Maths, Art and Code
item.description: I’ve always had cross over passions for many different things. Whether it’s music or hacking away at a weekend project, a desire to use my creative strengths and see things from a new angle is one of the biggest motivators in terms of learning new things for me. My latest development in terms of creative projects has had me venturing into territory using both the left and right hand side of my brain :)
